action.reasoning: Observation: The training script successfully ran on CPU and completed training for the h1hand-walk-v0 task. The model was saved as ppo_h1hand_walk.zip. The training showed reasonable metrics with decreasing losses and positive policy gradient improvements. Analysis: The model is trained on a single task (h1hand-walk-v0) with 10,000 timesteps. This is a good baseline to test the evaluation pipeline. The next step is to create a prediction script that can load this model and evaluate it on the test tasks. Decision: Create predict.py that loads the trained model and evaluates it on the h1hand-walk-v0 task first to validate the evaluation pipeline.
